milestones: A solution.py file exists containing the full implementation with file-name comment separators distinguishing frontend, backend, and database modules
User authentication is implemented with registration and login endpoints or functions handling credentials and session/token management
Quest management CRUD operations are implemented allowing creation, updating, and marking quests as complete
Character skill plan management is implemented with functionality to create, read, update, and delete skill plans
Real-time collaboration is implemented using WebSocket or equivalent mechanism enabling multiple users to simultaneously interact with shared quests or skill plans
A database schema or model layer is defined covering user profiles, quests, skill plans, and collaboration data with relationships between entities
